author: @eyramyra2036
comment: Jangan kita menilai org lain yg x nk bagi sedekah tu.. Its not their fault, sometimes they x nak ditipu bcz well u know, ramai org ada duit but still minta sedekah sbb malas nk kerja. Saya pernah kena depan mata yess RIGHT IN FRONT OF MY EYES.. Time tu i kerja jadi cashier sementara kat supermarket while tunggu naik skola balik and masa rehat nk gi makan kat luar, there is one guy Chinese minta duit makan and i give him RM5 and u know what, after habis makan, i lalu depan KFC near my workplace and i saw that guy buy KFC and bring botol air jenis TUPPERWARE .. I kerja pon, x dpt makan KFC bcz nk save duit buat bayar yuran sekolah. This shows why most people x nak beri sedekah bukan disebabkan kedekut or x nk kongsi rezeki. Kalau ditipu sekali, boleh tahan lagi. Kalau berkali2, siapa je tahan. But if someone minta duit depan2, i x sampai hati even though parents or friends kata org tu menipu, i hulur juga walaupun singgit dua sbb i juga susah but that doesn't mean i x boleh sedekah langsung.. Its not a bad things to sedekah but hati2 jangan bagi penipu kat luar sana tu teruskan minta sedekah and jadikan org lain mangsa mereka. 😊
